---
title: Systems of Differential Equations
description: Multiple changing quantities influencing each other.
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
### Learning Objectives

- Recognize systems of differential equations.
- Interpret coupled dynamics.
- Connect systems to linear algebra.
:::

Systems describe several variables changing at the same time.

```text
dx/dt = f(x, y)
dy/dt = g(x, y)
```

::: {.practice-box}
1. Why might two variables influence each other?
2. How can matrices represent linear systems of ODEs?
3. What is an equilibrium point?
:::
